item: Banners are managed by administrators only
source_text: We need to implement banners that will be universal entities, not tied to anything specific. For example, banners about discounts, new posts, etc. Basically, a banner should include text, an image, and may contain a hyperlink. Banners are managed by the administrator. Banners are used to inform users.

source_text: here's our backend summary @.docs/_project-summary.md here's our payments implementation summary [...] We need a unified payment purchase endpoint -- a single entry point for purchasing different products (subscriptions, one-time purchases, etc.)
